surface.description: The enforcement surface this vector exercises (design-time artifact vs runtime data).

relation.description: The action being checked, expressed as a relation (`can_view`, `can_edit`, `can_approve`, …).

context.description: Optional attribute context (OpenFGA conditional relationships / future ABAC).

description:
One committed **authz allow/deny vector** (doc 13 §2.f): a `{ subject, relation, object, context }`
question with its pinned `expect`ed effect, tagged with the enforcement `surface` it belongs to. The
same corpus spans `design-time` (artifact) and `runtime` (case/entity) so the harness can prove one
PDP answers both without drift.
